question: Develop a `DynamicArray` class that manages an array of integers on the heap. Include a constructor that takes size, a destructor that deallocates memory, and a method `setElement(index, value)`.

test_cases.expected:
Test Case 1: Basic functionality and initialization
Element at index 0: 10
Element at index 1: 0
Element at index 2: 0
Element at index 3: 0
Element at index 4: 50

Test Case 2: Out-of-bounds access handling
Caught expected exception: Index out of bounds: 5 for array of size 5

Test Case 3: Copy Constructor (Deep Copy)
Original array elements: 11 22 33 
Copied array elements: 99 22 33 

Test Case 4: Copy Assignment Operator (Deep Copy)
Original array elements: 11 22 33 
Assigned array elements: 77 22 33 

Test Case 5: Move Semantics
Source array before move: 1 2 0 0 
Moved array after move (should have content): 1 2 0 0 
Source array after move (should be empty/null): Size = 0
